title: China-to-Australia Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: Cordless Tool Battery Pack, Charger, and Power Supply
rows.target_requirement: Cordless tools should be assessed as a system. Low-voltage battery-only tool bodies may sit outside some EESS voltage thresholds, while mains chargers and external power supplies commonly require electrical safety and ACMA EMC review. Battery pack evidence should address the marketed pack, charger compatibility, markings, instructions, and transport or safety records where relevant.
target_standards: State and territory electrical safety legislation applying EESS duties
Radiocommunications Act 1992
Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021
AS/NZS 62841 series [voluntary cordless-tool safety evidence route]
Applicable AS/NZS charger, battery, and EMC standards [voluntary evidence route]
rows.china_equivalent: China files often treat the battery pack as an accessory to the GB 3883 tool report, with separate lithium battery transport or cell safety evidence. Australia review still needs the charger, external power supply, and battery pack mapped to local electrical safety, EMC, marking, and instruction expectations.
china_standards: China lithium battery safety and transport evidence where applicable
rows.gap: A frequent gap is missing charger and battery-pack linkage: cells, pack protection, charger limits, plug type, instructions, representative model coverage, and EMC configuration are not tied to the Australian SKU.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: applicable electrical safety and ACMA laws for in-scope chargers, power supplies, and regulated equipment. AS/NZS 62841 and related AS/NZS battery or charger standards are voluntary evidence routes.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：适用充电器、电源及受管设备须符合电气安全和 ACMA 法律。AS/NZS 62841 及相关 AS/NZS 电池或充电器标准是自愿证据路径。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：適用充電器、電源及受管設備須符合電氣安全和 ACMA 法律。AS/NZS 62841 及相關 AS/NZS 電池或充電器標準是自願證據路徑。

cn.en: China tool, battery, or transport evidence does not automatically satisfy Australian charger, EMC, RCM, and supply-chain duties.
cn.zh: 中国工具、电池或运输证据不会自动满足澳大利亚充电器、EMC、RCM 和供应链义务。
cn.zht: 中國工具、電池或運輸證據不會自動滿足澳洲充電器、EMC、RCM 和供應鏈義務。

rows.verdict: Not Australia-ready for cordless tools until the battery pack, charger, external power supply, and tool body are scoped separately and supported by Australian electrical safety, ACMA EMC, marking, and instruction evidence.

rows.target_requirement: EESS in-scope equipment is low-voltage equipment for household, personal, or similar use and is classified by risk level. For power tools, the file should separate the tool, charger, external power supply, and battery pack, then map each in-scope item to electrical safety obligations. AS/NZS 62841 can be used as a voluntary evidence route for tool safety.
target_standards: State and territory electrical safety legislation applying EESS duties
Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) Equipment Safety Rules
AS/NZS 62841 series [voluntary safety evidence route]
AS/NZS 3820 [voluntary essential safety evidence route]
rows.china_equivalent: China safety files commonly use GB 3883 for electric motor-operated hand-held tools, transportable tools, and lawn and garden machinery. Charger and adapter evidence may be separate. These reports need Australian scope, voltage, plug, marking, and risk-level review.
china_standards: China charger or power-supply safety standards where applicable
rows.gap: A frequent gap is treating a GB 3883 report as enough for the whole system. Australia review should cover the exact marketed configuration, AU plug or supply interface, charger inclusion, EESS level, and whether the evidence supports each in-scope item.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: applicable electrical safety law and EESS duties for in-scope equipment. AS/NZS 62841 and AS/NZS 3820 are voluntary evidence routes and should not be called mandatory standards.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：适用设备须符合电气安全法律和 EESS 义务。AS/NZS 62841 和 AS/NZS 3820 是自愿证据路径，不应称为强制标准。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：適用設備須符合電氣安全法律和 EESS 義務。AS/NZS 62841 和 AS/NZS 3820 是自願證據路徑，不應稱為強制標準。

cn.en: China domestic evidence commonly uses GB 3883 series and charger-specific reports where applicable.
cn.zh: 中国境内证据通常采用 GB 3883 系列及适用的充电器专项报告。
cn.zht: 中國境內證據通常採用 GB 3883 系列及適用的充電器專項報告。

rows.verdict: Conditionally non-compliant until electrical safety evidence is mapped to Australian EESS scope, risk level, and the actual tool system. GB 3883 alone is not a substitute for Australian electrical safety assessment.

rows.target_requirement: ACMA regulates certain electrical products supplied in Australia. Suppliers must check the applicable rules, show compliance, sign and keep records, register as a responsible supplier when required, and label the product. For motor-driven tools, chargers, electronic controllers, and power supplies, EMC evidence should cover the marketed configuration and support RCM labelling.
target_standards: Radiocommunications Act 1992
Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021
Radiocommunications Labelling (Electromagnetic Compatibility) Notice 2017
Applicable AS/NZS EMC standards [voluntary evidence route]
rows.china_equivalent: China compliance packages may include EMC reports in addition to GB 3883 safety evidence. Test standards, limits, operating modes, representative models, and charger inclusion still need ACMA-specific mapping.
china_standards: China EMC standards and test reports where applicable
rows.gap: The common gap is EMC evidence that tests only a bare tool or China-market configuration. The Australian record should show the exact RCM-labelled product system, including charger, battery pack, controller variants, and worst-case operating conditions where relevant.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: applicable ACMA rules under the Radiocommunications Act 1992 and related instruments. AS/NZS EMC standards are voluntary evidence routes and should not be described as mandatory standards.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：Radiocommunications Act 1992 及相关文书下的适用 ACMA 规则。AS/NZS EMC 标准是自愿证据路径，不应描述为强制标准。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：Radiocommunications Act 1992 及相關文書下的適用 ACMA 規則。AS/NZS EMC 標準是自願證據路徑，不應描述為強制標準。

cn.en: China EMC evidence may support review but does not automatically satisfy ACMA record, registration, and labelling obligations.
cn.zh: 中国 EMC 证据可支持审查，但不会自动满足 ACMA 记录、注册和标签义务。
cn.zht: 中國 EMC 證據可支援審查，但不會自動滿足 ACMA 記錄、註冊和標籤義務。

rows.verdict: Not Australia-ready until ACMA EMC evidence covers the actual supplied configuration and is tied to records, responsible-supplier registration where required, and RCM labelling.

rows.requirement: Market Access, EESS Registration, and RCM
rows.target_requirement: Australia uses state and territory electrical safety law, with the Electrical Equipment Safety System used in participating jurisdictions for in-scope low-voltage household, personal, or similar electrical equipment. A responsible supplier must meet EESS duties, register where required, and apply the Regulatory Compliance Mark under AS/NZS 4417 rules. AS/NZS standards are evidence routes and should not be described as mandatory standards.
target_standards: State and territory electrical safety legislation applying EESS duties
Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) Equipment Safety Rules
AS/NZS 4417.1 and AS/NZS 4417.2 [voluntary marking evidence route]
rows.china_equivalent: China files commonly rely on GB 3883 safety reports, CCC or voluntary certification where relevant, factory inspection records, and Chinese labelling. These materials do not by themselves create an Australian responsible supplier, EESS registration, or RCM basis.
china_standards: China CCC or voluntary certification where applicable
rows.gap: The main gap is legal operator and registration evidence. Australian supply needs an Australian or New Zealand responsible supplier or other compliant supply-chain basis, risk-level classification, registration where required, and correct RCM use.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: applicable Australian state or territory electrical safety law and EESS duties in participating jurisdictions. AS/NZS 4417 is a voluntary route for showing correct RCM marking practice.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：适用的澳大利亚州或领地电气安全法律及参与辖区的 EESS 义务。AS/NZS 4417 是展示正确 RCM 标识实践的自愿路径。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：適用的澳洲州或領地電氣安全法律及參與轄區的 EESS 義務。AS/NZS 4417 是展示正確 RCM 標識實務的自願路徑。

cn.en: China domestic certifications and GB 3883 evidence do not replace Australian supplier registration and RCM duties.
cn.zh: 中国境内认证和 GB 3883 证据不能替代澳大利亚供应商注册和 RCM 义务。
cn.zht: 中國境內認證和 GB 3883 證據不能替代澳洲供應商註冊和 RCM 義務。

rows.verdict: Not Australia-ready until the file identifies the responsible supplier, EESS scope and risk level, registration status, and RCM marking basis. GB 3883 evidence alone is not an Australian market-access file.

rows.target_requirement: EESS guidance refers to relevant AS or AS/NZS standards for certification and evidence, and ACMA compliance commonly relies on applicable technical standards. For this comparison, AS/NZS 62841 and related AS/NZS standards are treated as voluntary evidence routes: the legal duties come from Australian laws, rules, notices, registrations, records, and labelling obligations.
target_standards: State and territory electrical safety legislation applying EESS duties
Radiocommunications Act 1992
Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021
AS/NZS 62841 series [voluntary evidence route]
Applicable AS/NZS EMC standards [voluntary evidence route]
rows.china_equivalent: GB 3883 is technically related to the IEC 62841 family used internationally for power-tool safety, but China-format reports, sample descriptions, deviations, and labelling do not automatically map to Australian records or RCM claims.
china_standards: China EMC standards and test reports where applicable
rows.gap: The gap is standards translation and claim discipline. The file should avoid saying AS/NZS 62841 is mandatory, should identify it as a voluntary route, and should separately cite the mandatory legal instruments that create the Australian compliance duty.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: Australian electrical safety and ACMA legal instruments where applicable. AS/NZS 62841, AS/NZS 3820, AS/NZS 4417, and AS/NZS EMC standards are voluntary evidence routes in this dataset.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：适用的澳大利亚电气安全和 ACMA 法律文书。本数据集中 AS/NZS 62841、AS/NZS 3820、AS/NZS 4417 和 AS/NZS EMC 标准均为自愿证据路径。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：適用的澳洲電氣安全和 ACMA 法律文書。本資料集中 AS/NZS 62841、AS/NZS 3820、AS/NZS 4417 和 AS/NZS EMC 標準均為自願證據路徑。

cn.en: GB 3883 evidence is useful source material but not a direct substitute for Australian legal records and RCM support.
cn.zh: GB 3883 证据是有用来源材料，但不能直接替代澳大利亚法律记录和 RCM 支持。
cn.zht: GB 3883 證據是有用來源材料，但不能直接替代澳洲法律記錄和 RCM 支援。

rows.verdict: Conditionally acceptable only after the technical file distinguishes mandatory Australian law from voluntary AS/NZS evidence routes and maps GB 3883 results to the actual Australian product, markings, records, and declarations.
